news.headline: 50 sick, 1 dead from E. Coli in McDonald’s Quarter Pounders per CDC. Bacteria linked to burger ingredient.
news.summary: The Centers for Disease Control and Prevention (CDC) reported that close to 50 individuals have fallen ill, with one fatality, due to a lethal bacteria linked to an ingredient in a burger item served by a popular fast food chain.

news.headline: Community health workers rally at South Riverdale Community Health Centre in Toronto to combat severe underfunding and understaffing crisis, demanding real wage increase after 8 months negotiation. Stressful conditions persist for staff at the centre.
news.summary: In Toronto today, community health care workers at the South Riverdale Community Health Centre (SRCHC) are rallying to address severe underfunding and understaffing issues at the facility. After over eight months of negotiations, SRCHC management has not provided CUPE Local 5399 members with a substantial wage increase. These workers have faced high stress levels due to challenging work conditions for years. The demand for improvement comes as they seek better support amidst the ongoing crisis.

news.headline: EnLink Midstream (NYSE: ENLC) to release Q3 earnings on Nov 6, 2024 after market close. Investors can access presentation on Investors.EnLink.com.
news.summary: EnLink Midstream, LLC (NYSE: ENLC) based in Dallas revealed that it is set to release its third-quarter earnings report and conduct an investor presentation on its official website at Investors.EnLink.com following the market closure on Wednesday, November 6, 2024. This update comes as part of its ongoing financial disclosures and aims to provide stakeholders and the investment community with insights into the company's performance for the quarter. It signifies a crucial event for EnLink as it continues to navigate the market landscape.

news.headline: Quantum Control and CORRIDOR launch SalesEdge Quoting & AI Solutions Suite for aviation ERP, aiming to streamline quoting processes.
news.summary: In MERRIMACK, N.H., CAMP Systems’ subsidiary companies, Quantum Control and CORRIDOR, renowned for their expertise in aviation ERP and workflow automation, have introduced SalesEdge Quoting and unveiled the beta edition of an AI-Based Automated Parts Pricing Tool, marking the debut of their AI Solutions Suite. These cutting-edge tools are set to transform the way aviation parts vendors handle quoting procedures and price their stock, aiming to tackle significant inefficiencies that frequently impede operations in the industry.

news.headline: Origin Bancorp (NYSE:OBK) to release quarterly earnings on 2024-10-23, expected EPS $0.66. Investors await surpassing estimates.
news.summary: Origin Bancorp, listed on NYSE as OBK, is set to unveil its quarterly earnings on Wednesday, October 23, 2024. Analysts are projecting an earnings per share (EPS) of $0.66 for the company. The upcoming announcement is highly awaited by investors, who are hoping for results that exceed expectations and positive guidance for the subsequent quarter.

news.headline: NETGEAR granted equity awards on Oct 15, 2024, including to new President & GM, Pramod Badjate, in accordance with Nasdaq rule 5635(c)(4).
news.summary: SAN JOSE, Calif.-- NETGEAR, Inc. revealed the granting of equity awards on October 15, 2024, to the recently appointed President and General Manager, Pramod Badjate, for the NETGEAR for Business (NFB) segment, along with other newly recruited employees across various business units within the organization. This announcement aligns with Nasdaq Listing Rule 5635(c)(4). NTGR (Nasdaq) is known for its innovative networking solutions catering to businesses, homes, and service providers globally.

news.headline: Brookline Bancorp (NASDAQ:BRKL) to report EPS of $0.20 in upcoming earnings release. Investors hopeful for positive news.
news.summary: Brookline Bancorp (NASDAQ:BRKL) is set to disclose its quarterly financial results on Wednesday, October 23, 2024. Analysts are projecting an earnings per share (EPS) of $0.20 for the period. Anticipation is high in the market as stakeholders look for potential beats on estimates and positive guidance for the upcoming quarter. Investors should stay attentive to the company's performance following the announcement.

news.headline: Aptar wins federal contract to develop new sterilization tech for medical devices in Crystal Lake, Illinois.
news.summary: A company based in Crystal Lake, Illinois, has been granted a contract by the federal government to enhance a new sterilization technology for medical devices. The contract aims to advance the use of innovative sterilization methods and techniques.

news.headline: First Internet (NASDAQ: INBK) to release quarterly earnings on 2024-10-23, with anticipated EPS of $0.83. Investors eagerly await exceeding estimates.
news.summary: First Internet (NASDAQ:INBK) is scheduled to unveil its quarterly earnings report on October 23, 2024. Analysts predict that the company will post an earnings per share (EPS) of $0.83. Investors are eagerly awaiting this announcement, hoping for results that exceed expectations and positive guidance for the upcoming quarter. The full story can be found on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Bridgewater Bancshares to report Q3 earnings on 2024-10-23, analysts estimate EPS of $0.24. Investors await exceeding estimates and future guidance.
news.summary: Bridgewater Bancshares (NASDAQ:BWB) is gearing up to release its quarterly earnings report on Wednesday, October 23, 2024. Analysts are projecting an earnings per share (EPS) of $0.24 for the company. The upcoming announcement is highly awaited by investors who are hoping for a potential beat on estimates and optimistic guidance for the following quarter. Overall, there is much anticipation surrounding the financial performance of Bridgewater Bancshares.

news.headline: Blue Foundry's upcoming earnings report on 2024-10-23 is expected to show an EPS of $-0.17. Investors await positive news.
news.summary: Blue Foundry (BLFY) is set to announce its quarterly earnings on October 23, 2024. Analysts are forecasting an earnings per share of -$0.17. Investors are anticipating the report, eager for potential news that exceeds expectations and provides optimistic guidance for the upcoming quarter. For further details, refer to the complete article on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Travelzoo set to report $0.19 EPS on Oct 23, with optimistic market outlook and 59.24% potential upside from analysts.
news.summary: Travelzoo (NASDAQ:TZOO) is set to announce its quarterly earnings with analysts expecting an EPS of $0.19 on October 23, 2024. The market anticipates news of surpassing estimates and positive guidance for the next quarter, as guidance can impact stock prices significantly. In the previous quarter, Travelzoo exceeded EPS by $0.01, resulting in a 7.49% share price increase the following day. As of October 18, Travelzoo shares were trading at $12.56, showing an 83.4% increase over the past 52 weeks. Analysts rate Travelzoo as a Buy with an average one-year price target of $20.0, indicating a potential 59.24% upside. Investors should keep track of market sentiments and industry expectations for better insights.

news.headline: CAVA (NYSE: CAVA) to announce Q3 2024 financial results on Nov 12, 2024 at 5:00 PM ET. Press release at 4:10 PM ET.
news.summary: CAVA Group, Inc. (NYSE: CAVA), a Mediterranean fast-casual restaurant brand known for its focus on heart, health, and humanity in food, will be conducting a conference call on November 12, 2024, at 5:00 PM Eastern Time to review their financial performance for the third quarter of that year and offer a business update. The company plans to release a press statement containing the third-quarter financial results around 4:10 PM Eastern Time on the same day. The call will also be available for live streaming.

news.headline: ADM to report Q3 2024 financial results on Nov. 5, with a webcast at 9 am CT for company update. Visit www.adm.com/webcast.
news.summary: In Chicago, ADM (NYSE: ADM) is set to unveil its financial results for Q3 of 2024 on Tuesday, Nov. 5, before the market opens. Alongside this, a slide presentation will be accessible for download. The firm will conduct a webcast at 9 a.m. Central Time to deliberate on the outcomes and offer a corporate update. The webcast can be accessed at www.adm.com/webcast to listen in or acquire the slide presentation. Additionally, a replay of the webcast will be obtainable for an extended duration at www.adm.com/we.

news.headline: Busey Corp reveals Q3 earnings for 2024.
news.summary: In a recent report, it was revealed that the unemployment rate in the country has reached a record low of 3.8%, the lowest in the past decade. This significant drop in unemployment has led to over 400,000 new jobs being created in various sectors across the nation. The strong job market has also resulted in a notable increase in consumer spending, with a growth rate of 4.5% recorded in the last quarter. Additionally, the stock market has seen substantial gains, with the main indexes rising by 12% on average in the past year. Overall, the economy is showing promising signs of growth and stability as a result of these positive developments.

news.headline: Helium Evolution's partner NAH plans to drill joint well in Mankota area, part of development plan for 9 wells.
news.summary: In Calgary, Alberta, on October 22, 2024, Helium Evolution Incorporated (TSXV:HEVI), a Canadian helium exploration company concentrating on projects in southern Saskatchewan, received notification from its partner, North American Helium Inc. (“NAH”), about the plan to drill a joint well in the Mankota region. This decision is aligned with the initial strategy outlined on April 2, 2024, which detailed a development plan encompassing potentially nine wells in the Mankota area.

news.headline: K92 Mining discovers significant strike extension south at Arakompa and thick high-grade zone.
news.summary: K92 Mining has revealed a noteworthy extension of a strike towards the south at Arakompa, indicating a new high-grade zone with the potential to be thick. This development could prove to be significant, with the extension demonstrating promising results. The discovery is anticipated to have a substantial impact on the overall mining operation, bolstering production and potentially increasing output. Such findings are crucial for the continued success and growth of K92 Mining, showcasing the company's commitment to exploration and development in the mining sector. This new extension could play a crucial role in future production, with the company likely to benefit from the discovery in terms of increased reserves and improved operational performance.

news.headline: DIRTT, industrialized construction leader, to reveal Q3 2024 financials on Nov 6, 2024 after market closure.
news.summary: In Calgary, Alberta, on October 22, 2024, DIRTT Environmental Solutions Ltd. revealed plans to unveil its financial results for the third quarter of 2024 on November 6, 2024. DIRTT, a prominent player in industrialized construction, will announce this information after the market closes. The company trades on the Toronto Stock Exchange under the ticker symbol DRT and on the OTC markets under DRTTF.

news.headline: Lavoro (Nasdaq: LVRO; LVROW) to announce fiscal Q4 2024 results on Oct 31; earnings conference on Nov 1.
news.summary: In São Paulo, Brazil, on October 22, 2024, Lavoro Limited (Nasdaq: LVRO; LVROW), which is the inaugural U.S.-listed agricultural inputs retailer in Latin America, has announced that it will release its financial outcomes for the fiscal fourth quarter of 2024 post market closure on Thursday, October 31, 2024.

news.headline: Oilfield service provider Baker Hughes reports Q3 2024 financial performance.
Third Quarter 2024 results released by First Quantum Minerals.
LPV announces resignation of board member Paul Vollant, effective Oct 11, 2024. Thanked for service. TSX.V: VAND, OTCQX: VANAF.
news.summary: In Toronto on October 22, 2024, Largo Physical Vanadium Corp. (LPV) revealed the resignation of Paul Vollant from its Board of Directors, effective October 11, 2024. LPV, traded as VAND on TSX.V and VANAF on OTCQX, expressed gratitude to Mr. Vollant for his dedication and input during his time with the company.

news.headline: Minerals Technologies partners with AIM for AI tech in mining equipment, Oct 22, 2024. (NYSE: MTX), a global mineral company.
news.summary: In recent news from October 22, 2024, Minerals Technologies Inc. (NYSE: MTX) has announced an expansion in its collaboration with AIM Intelligent Machines Inc., a tech firm renowned for AI-driven solutions in mining equipment. As a leading global specialty minerals company, MTI aims to enhance safety, productivity, and analytical capabilities in this sector through this partnership with AIM.

news.headline: Wheels Up to equip entire fleet with Gogo Galileo HDX for onboard Wi-Fi. Agreement reached with Gogo Business Aviation.
news.summary: In Las Vegas on October 22, 2024, private aviation company Wheels Up announced at NBAA-BACE booth 1601 an agreement with Gogo Business Aviation (NASDAQ: GOGO) to equip their entire fleet with Gogo Galileo HDX, a Low Earth Orbit (LEO) global broadband satellite solution. This new Wi-Fi upgrade aims to enhance the onboard experience for passengers.

news.headline: KBR releases 2023 Sustainability and Corporate Responsibility Report showcasing progress in sustainability initiatives.
news.summary: Houston-based company KBR, traded on the NYSE under the symbol KBR, has recently unveiled its 2023 Sustainability and Corporate Responsibility Report. The report highlights the company's ongoing efforts in sustainability, showcasing advancements in its operations and the provision of sustainability-driven solutions. This release comes as part of KBR's commitment to transparency and accountability, demonstrating a dedication to sustainable practices.

news.headline: Bankshares firm, CrossFirst, highlights Q3 2024 financial results.
Douglas Elliman's CEO and Chairman Howard M. Lorber retires at 76, leaving a legacy in luxury real estate.
news.summary: Miami-based company Douglas Elliman Inc. (NYSE: DOUG) has disclosed that Howard M. Lorber, aged 76, will be stepping down from his roles as President, Chief Executive Officer, and Chairman of the Board. The company acknowledged Lorber's contributions, recognizing his strategic foresight and commitment that have elevated Douglas Elliman to become a leading real estate brokerage firm in the nation, renowned for its luxury services and innovation. Lorber's retirement marks the end of an era, following his years of hard work and dedication to the company.

news.headline: S. Korean Consumer Sentiment Actual 101.7 (Forecast -, Previous 100.0)
Lynnette A. Clinton returns as Chief Information Officer at BayCare Health System in Clearwater, Florida.
news.summary: In Clearwater, Florida on October 22, 2024, Lynnette A. Clinton has re-joined BayCare Health System in the role of Chief Information Officer. Clinton previously served as the vice president of applications in the information services department until December of last year. The CIO position marks her return to the health system in a prominent role, overseeing all information technology operations.

news.headline: Fetch partners with Stride to support delivery partners offering insurance, tax tools, and savings. AUSTIN, Texas, Oct. 22, 2024.
news.summary: This platform, based in Austin, Texas, announced on October 22, 2024, a partnership with Stride to provide independent contractors with access to insurance, tax tools, and financial savings. Fetch, known as the first offsite package management solution for apartment communities, offers this unique service to support independent contractors.

news.headline: Dow Jones drops slightly, Trump stock rises, Tesla falls before earnings. Yields at record high.
news.summary: In afternoon trading on Tuesday, the Dow Jones saw a slight decline as yields continued to reach record highs. Concerns surrounding the upcoming election contributed to increased volatility in the market, leading to drops in the stock prices of Nvidia and Tesla. This news comes amidst a backdrop where the Trump stock performed well. Tesla is encountering a drop in stock value ahead of their earnings report.

news.headline: FAA releases new rules allowing Joby's electric air taxis operation. SFAR sets requirements for integration into US aviation system.
news.summary: In Santa Cruz, California, Joby Aviation, Inc. (NYSE: JOBY), known for developing electric air taxis for commercial passenger service, expressed appreciation for the recently issued regulations aimed at facilitating the operation of their innovative aircraft in the U.S. The Federal Aviation Administration ("FAA") released the Special Federal Aviation Regulation ("SFAR"), outlining guidelines for the secure and effective integration of aircraft similar to Joby's within the country's aviation network.

news.headline: S&P 500 ends slightly down in the Closing Bell report.
OpenAI names Scott Schools, ex-Uber exec, as chief compliance officer to manage regulatory matters.
news.summary: On Tuesday, OpenAI, an artificial intelligence startup, appointed Scott Schools as their chief compliance officer to enhance their ability to develop beneficial AI technology while upholding integrity standards in changing regulatory landscapes. Scott, a legal expert with decades of experience in public and private sectors, previously served as Associate Deputy Attorney General at the U.S. Department of Justice, influencing national legal strategies and offering ethical guidance. This move aims to support OpenAI's commitment to ethical AI development.

news.headline: Amazon One Medical, backed by Amazon.com, launches AI tools to reduce admin tasks for physicians, saving over 17 hours weekly.
news.summary: Amazon One Medical, a subsidiary of Amazon.com, Inc. (NASDAQ: AMZN), is utilizing AI-driven tools to revolutionize healthcare delivery and alleviate administrative burdens for physicians. By streamlining tasks like record review and note-taking, the company aims to free up more time for patient interaction and improve overall patient experiences. This initiative seeks to combat healthcare provider burnout, with family physicians currently spending an average of over 17 hours per week on administrative duties, equivalent to two full days that could be better utilized for patient care. Andrew Diamond, the chief medical officer at Amazon One Medical, is overseeing these efforts to enhance the efficiency and quality of healthcare services. Meanwhile, Nvidia has teamed up with startup Aidoc to further advance the adoption of AI technology in the healthcare sector.

news.headline: DOJ challenges Johnson & Johnson's bankruptcy bid to dismiss 60,000 talc lawsuits, increased settlement offer to $9 billion.
news.summary: The U.S. Trustee Program, part of the Department of Justice, has motioned to dismiss a Chapter 11 filing by a Johnson & Johnson subsidiary in Houston. This filing aims to resolve over 60,000 talc-related lawsuits, marking J&J's third attempt at this strategy in three years. In September, Johnson & Johnson reportedly raised its settlement offer by $1 billion to a total of around $9 billion to address claims linking its talc baby powder to gynecological cancer. The DOJ contends that J&J's latest bankruptcy move is in bad faith.

news.headline: ASPC is accepting applications for Editor-in-Chief of AJPC. Exciting opportunity announced by the society.
news.summary: In Houston on October 22, 2024, the American Society for Preventive Cardiology (ASPC) disclosed that they are opening applications for the Editor-in-Chief role at the American Journal of Preventive Cardiology (AJPC). This prestigious international journal covers a wide range of topics related to preventive cardiology, offering a platform for researchers and professionals in the field. Interested individuals can now apply for this key position within the organization.

news.headline: VyStar employees volunteer over 6,000 hours in community partnerships during 'Good is everywhere' event.
news.summary: Over a 14-day period, residents in Florida and Georgia were treated to complimentary visits to various cultural institutions, including museums, zoos, and science centers, courtesy of VyStar Credit Union's initiative. The event, held from October 22, 2024, aimed to promote community engagement, volunteerism, and member appreciation. Thousands of individuals benefited from this program, showcasing the credit union's commitment to giving back to the community.

news.headline: Next-generation CLAAS® AcuFORM™ LAAO System to be featured at TCT 2024, presented by Professor Jens Erik Nielsen-Kudsk.
news.summary: Conformal Medical, Inc. will showcase its latest system during a technology innovation session and live case presentation led by Professor Jens Erik Nielsen-Kudsk in Nashua, New Hampshire on October 22, 2024. The company unveiled the next-generation CLAAS® AcuFORM™ Left Atrial Appendage platform.

news.headline: Law firm investigating FSHP, YOTA, PWUP for security law violations on behalf of shareholders. - Oct. 22, 2024
news.summary: On October 22, 2024, Halper Sadeh LLC, a law firm focused on investor rights, has initiated an investigation into several companies for potential breaches. Specifically, they are looking into Flag Ship Acquisition Corporation for possible violations of federal securities laws and breaches of fiduciary duties towards shareholders. The investigation aims to assess any discrepancies in the company's conduct. This examination underscores the importance of adhering to regulations and protecting shareholder interests.

news.headline: Enphase Energy's stock drops as Q3 earnings miss projections. US revenue up 43% to $380.9M, European revenue falls 15%.
news.summary: Enphase Energy Inc (NASDAQ:ENPH) disclosed its third-quarter financial results, falling short of analyst predictions. In Q3, the company reported revenues of $380.9 million, below the expected $391.979 million. Adjusted earnings per share were at 65 cents, missing the estimated 77 cents per share. U.S. revenue rose by around 43% from the previous quarter, attributed to increased shipments to distributors. Conversely, European revenues dropped by about 15% quarter-over-quarter due to a "further softening" in demand. For more details, the full article is accessible on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: DBV reports good news for Viaskin® Peanut Patch in US and EU with positive regulatory updates.
Veritex Holdings, Inc. (Nasdaq: VBTX) declares $0.20 per share quarterly cash dividend on common stock. Payment on/after Nov 22 to shareholders of record by Nov 8, 2024.
news.summary: Dallas-based Veritex Holdings, Inc. (Nasdaq: VBTX) declared a quarterly cash dividend of $0.20 per share for its common stock. The dividend will be payable on or after November 22, 2024, to shareholders of record as of November 8, 2024. Veritex is the parent company of Veritex Community Bank.

news.headline: Ocean Biomedical received a Staff Determination Letter from Nasdaq stating non-compliance with filing requirements for Forms 10-K and 10-Q for various periods and faced potential delisting.
news.summary: Ocean Biomedical, Inc. received a Staff Determination Letter from Nasdaq stating that it did not comply with filing requirements on April 18, 2024, May 22, 2024, and August 19, 2024, for not filing its Form 10-K and Forms 10-Q. Despite being granted an exception to regain compliance until October 14, 2024, the Company failed to do so. The Company will appeal the determination to a Hearings Panel as per Nasdaq Listing Rule 5800 Series. The key dates mentioned are April 18, 2024, May 22, 2024, August 19, 2024, June 17, 2024, August 27, 2024, and October 14, 2024.

news.headline: Conavi Medical Corp. has engaged ICP Securities Inc. for automated market making services at a fee of C$7,500/month.
news.summary: Conavi Medical Corp. has enlisted ICP Securities Inc. for automated market making services, using ICP Premium™ algorithm, in accordance with TSX Venture Exchange guidelines, in a deal starting from October 22, 2024. The agreement is for four months with automatic renewals unless terminated with a fee of C$7,500 monthly. No performance factors or equity compensation included in this no-stock options deal. ICP currently holds no Company securities but may do so in the future, excluding involvement in the deal.

news.headline: Veritex Holdings, Inc. (Nasdaq: VBTX) reports Q3 2024 results for quarter ended Sept 30, 2024.
news.summary: On October 22, 2024, Veritex Holdings, Inc. (Nasdaq: VBTX), the parent company of Veritex Community Bank, shared their quarterly outcomes for the period concluding on September 30, 2024.

news.headline: UGI Corp (NYSE: UGI) to reveal FY 2024 earnings on Nov 21, with conference call on Nov 22 at 9:00 AM ET. Listen live at https://www.ugicorp.com/investors.
news.summary: UGI Corporation (NYSE: UGI) is set to unveil its fiscal year 2024 earnings on November 21, 2024, after the market closes. The company has scheduled a live internet audio webcast for its conference call on November 22 at 9:00 AM ET to delve into the results, financial outlook, and other business developments. Stakeholders can tune in to the live audio webcast and its replay on the company's investor relations website at https://www.ugicorp.com/investors.

news.headline: Reykjavík Energy's green bond auction on Oct 22, 2024 with total bids worth ISK 4,440 million.
news.summary: On October 22nd, 2024, Reykjavík Energy (Orkuveita Reykjavíkur) successfully completed a green bond auction for classes OR031033 GB, OR280845 GB, and OR180255 GB. The auction attracted a total of ISK 4,440 million in bids for nominal value.

news.headline: US API Gasoline Stock Change Actual -2.019M (Forecast -, Previous -5.926M)
US API Distillate Stock Change Actual -1.478M (Forecast -, Previous -2.672M)
